name: L7_weyl_extraction
divergence_log: L7 carrier-level Weyl L/R projector identities proved symbolically via sympy (load-bearing) and cross-validated numerically over a 128-sample S^3 family; negatives confirm non-sigma_z splits break chirality; boundaries confirm pole/equator structure.

pytorch.reason: available but not required for L7 algebra

pyg.reason: graph structure not needed at L7 (pointwise spinor extraction)

z3.reason: not invoked: sympy CAS already closes the 2x2 identities exactly

cvc5.reason: not invoked: sympy closes the identities; z3 is the proof fallback

sympy.reason: symbolic 2x2 matrix algebra for projector idempotence/orthogonality/completeness

clifford.reason: Cl(3) rotor form deferred to L8 chiral density; not needed for extraction identities

geomstats.reason: S^3 manifold routines not required; Hopf sampling is a 4-tuple norm

e3nn.reason: SO(3) irreps irrelevant at carrier-level L/R split

rustworkx.reason: graph tools not required at L7

toponetx.reason: cell complex gating is L6-side; L7 pointwise
